Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0AB2 "MATTERHORNSCREAMER-C600-0AB2" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $c600 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Matterhorn Screamer!.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $C600 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts. 2. Copies 256 bytes of data from $C690 down to $0000 and 512 bytes of data from $C790 to $0200 so that the dump can start at $0400. 3. Sets up the correct VICII settings and border colour. 4. Runs the first part of the init routine (copied from $1D3C - $1D72), which was executed in the original loader. 5. Re-enables raster interrupts and timer NMIs. 6. Jumps to the entry point at $0AB2 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy above overwriting the boot code).
